info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure Schema Registry
info.description: SchemaRegistryClient is a client for registering and retrieving schemas from the Azure Schema Registry service.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Properties For Existing Schema

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

request.description: Gets the properties referencing an existing schema within the specified schema group, as matched by schema content comparison.

response.name: There is no content to send for this request, but the headers may be useful.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

description.content: URL location of schema, identified by schema group, schema name, and version.
References schema group.
References specific schema in registry namespace.
URL location of schema, identified by schema ID.
References schema name.
Version of the returned schema.

response.name: An unexpected error response.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

description.content: String error code indicating what went wrong.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Specific Schema Versions

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

request.description: Gets one specific version of one schema.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

description.content: The content type for given schema.
URL location of schema, identified by schema group, schema name, and version.
References schema group.

response.name: An unexpected error response.

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

request.description: Gets the list of all versions of one schema.

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

response.name: An unexpected error response.

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

request.description: Register new schema. If schema of specified name does not exist in specified group, schema is created at version 1. If schema of specified name exists already in specified group, schema is created at latest version + 1.

response.name: There is no content to send for this request, but the headers may be useful.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

description.content: URL location of schema, identified by schema group, schema name, and version.
References schema group.
References specific schema in registry namespace.
URL location of schema, identified by schema ID.
References schema name.
Version of the returned schema.

response.name: An unexpected error response.

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

description.content: String error code indicating what went wrong.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get A Registered Schema By Its Unique Id Reference

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

variable.description: (Required) Schema ID that uniquely identifies a schema in the registry namespace.

request.description: Gets a registered schema by its unique ID.  Azure Schema Registry guarantees that ID is unique within a namespace. Operation response type is based on serialization of schema requested.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

description.content: The content type for given schema.
URL location of schema, identified by schema group, schema name, and version.
References schema group.
References specific schema in registry namespace.
URL location of schema, identified by schema ID.
References schema name.
Version of the returned schema.

response.name: An unexpected error response.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

description.content: String error code indicating what went wrong.
